content.full_text:
10/23/91

San Francisco Elections Commission
426 J Street, P.O. Box 2847, Suite 200
Sacramento, CA 95812

Co-Chairmen: John Hunt
Co-Chairman: [illegible] Bradshaw
Administrator: Villas Andre

FPPC
OCT 31 10 07 AM '91

Subject: Report of Violations Violating Commission
Exhibit A enclosed in 8 of
night 8 day precind 9 complaint
appeal attached 3

References: Fair employment involving the
Hatch Compromise and
Collegium Jurisdiction appeal

1. Request my own rights petition form
constitutional administration privilege 8
Khurghetpore Nature implementing to deny equal
rights to employment, housing and other interest.

2. Desire Procedure to clear records of
owned public entity action.

3. Trace violation Exemptions X this matter.

[signature]
Jimmy Stovens Powell
P.O. Box 2048
Yountville CA 90117

[The image shows a mostly blank lined notebook page with very faint, illegible handwriting throughout. The handwriting is too faint and unclear to accurately transcribe the specific text. The page appears to be from a spiral-bound notebook with a pink/red margin line on the left side.]

sections.question:
1. Request my civil rights protection from unconstitutional administration proceedings of discriminatory nature implemented to deny equal rights to employment, housing and other interests.

2. Advising procedure to clean records of criminal public entity actions.

3. Please refer your prompt attention to this matter.
sections.question_synthetic: The requestor seeks civil rights protections against allegedly unconstitutional and discriminatory administrative proceedings affecting employment and housing rights, and requests advice on procedures to clear records of criminal public entity actions.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an incoming request letter, not an FPPC advice letter response. The document contains no FPPC conclusion or formal analysis. The requestor's claims reference Fair Employment & Housing Act and Workers Compensation matters, which may fall outside FPPC's primary jurisdiction over political practices and conflict of interest. Second page is blank.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: 1. Request my civil rights protection from unconstitutional administration proceedings of discriminatory nature implemented to deny equal rights to employment, housing and other interests.

2. Advising procedure to clean records of criminal public entity actions.

3. Please refer your prompt attention to this matter.

embedding.summary: This is an incoming letter from Leon F. Ellison Powell requesting FPPC assistance with civil rights protections against allegedly discriminatory administrative proceedings and asking for guidance on clearing records of criminal public entity actions.
